content.text: I'll create a new public Git repository in Gitea using the REST API. Let me use the `/user/repos` endpoint to create the repository.

  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Authorization: token a3d77e8c99e8fcb70b3f5d03034202c9c95f2df7" \
  -d '{
    "name": "test-repo-default",
    "description": "A test repository created by the AI agent",
    "private": false,
    "auto_init": true
  }' | jq .
